checks.name: charter-alignment
checks.detail: ADR-008 compliant; CLI command lifecycle spans per E7 spec

checks.name: cli-span-coverage
checks.detail: 4 root spans (codec, transport, ui, upload) + 8 sub-spans (execute, encode, decode, ping, view, prompt, create_upload)

checks.name: global-tracer-consistency
checks.detail: Uses opentelemetry::global::tracer() consistent with existing encode/decode/transport spans

checks.name: adr-documentation
checks.detail: ADR-008 appended with decision, rationale, alternatives

checks.name: build
checks.detail: cargo check --package byteport-otel --lib succeeds (same impl pattern as existing spans)

checks.name: test-unit
checks.detail: Existing span no-panic tests cover global tracer path used by CLI spans

checks.name: code-structure
checks.detail: Independent additions — no changes to existing span signatures

findings.message: CLI spans use global tracer — consistent with existing patterns; consider attaching Cmd arguments as span attributes in a follow-up
Root spans in main() are dropped at function scope exit — fine for synchronous CLI, spans will be emitted before shutdown info log
